author: Miyah Reavish
text: I had a great experience at this dental office. The team was professional, efficient, and made the entire visit smooth from start to finish. They worked quickly without making me feel rushed, and they clearly explained everything that was going on. When they determined I needed additional treatment, they promptly referred me to an oral surgeon, which I really appreciated. It made the whole process feel organized and well-coordinated. I’ll definitely be returning in the future. Highly recommend!

author: Gwen Rader
text: My hygienist Tiffany was fantastic during my visit today to Cross Creek Dental. She was incredibly thorough with my cleaning, yet gentle, and took her time to answer any questions I had which was really helpful. I especially appreciated how she made sure I wasn't uncomfortable. She's very professional and has a cheerful attitude that made the whole experience great. I'll definitely be back!

author: abby savin
text: Dr Valerie and her team have been amazing and did everything to make me feel comfortable and leaving confident after my appointment. I appreciate everyone here and all the smiling faces making you feel welcome!

author: Shauni Lee
text: I had a great experience here! The staff was incredibly friendly and welcoming from the moment I walked through the door, which immediately put me at ease. Scheduling an appointment was super easy and stress-free, which I really appreciated. Overall, everything from start to finish felt smooth and professional. I’d definitely recommend this office to anyone looking for a comfortable and positive dental visit!

author: Todd Vanmeter
text: We waited before leaving a review to allow time for all five of us (including three children) to be seen. We are more than pleased with our experience. Unlike many practices that upsell or take advantage of patients, we have seen none of that here. We have been pleasantly surprised by the reasonable costs, the professionalism of the entire staff, and especially the exceptional care provided by both dentists.
